description: Tabular spec for Function 3 tax strategy ranking. Feature matrix order matches backend build_ml_feature_matrix_v1 and training table derivations. Rules engine remains authoritative; post-engine numeric fields are legal outputs only.

column_transformer_layout.implementation_note: Frozen artifact uses one Pipeline(median SimpleImputer, StandardScaler) over all 12 names in feature_order_in_matrix for parity with tax_opt_best_model_v1 placeholder (12-D). Per-feature scaling notes below are dissertation semantics; extend to multi-block ColumnTransformer in v2 if needed.

sklearn_compatibility.input: numpy ndarray or array-like with shape (n_samples, n_features); columns must follow feature_order_in_matrix order (integer indices 0..n-1 in the transformer).
sklearn_compatibility.notes: Single block applies median imputation then StandardScaler to all columns. For supervised learning on savings_vs_baseline_lkr, drop that column from X before transform (see features[].exclude_from_x_when_predicting_savings).

targets.description: max(baseline_tax - candidate_tax, 0) in LKR; not used as input when training that target (exclude from X).

features.name: annual_gross_income
features.meaning: Profile annual gross (salary + business + other) in LKR.
features.source: TaxOptBProfileV1.annual_gross_income / training row derived sum of income fields.

features.name: annual_salary_income
features.meaning: Structured annual salary component (incl. overtime/bonus roll-up in intake).

features.name: annual_other_income
features.meaning: Other assessable inflows in LKR (MVP gross bucket).

features.name: employment_type_code
features.meaning: Ordinal code: employee=0, self_employed=1, business_owner=2, other=3.

features.name: n_ordered_relief_codes
features.meaning: Count of reliefs in the active grid (sorted relief keys with MVP caps).

features.name: n_included_relief_codes
features.meaning: Number of reliefs included in this strategy candidate (subset grid).

features.name: total_tax_lkr
features.meaning: Deterministic total tax for this candidate after compliance.

features.name: baseline_tax_lkr
features.meaning: Deterministic total tax for baseline cap_subset_0 (same taxpayer).

training_table_column_map._comment: Optional join from build_training_table long-format rows into this matrix.

version_lock: Must match best_model_summary.json field feature_version exactly.
